6:
SELECT
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_cte WHERE Segment='SME') -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_cte WHERE Segment='LAM') AS SME_LAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_cte WHERE Segment='LAM') -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_cte WHERE Segment='KAM') AS LAM_KAM,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_cte WHERE Segment='KAM') -
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM avg_cte WHERE Segment='SME') AS KAM_SME
FROM (
  WITH cte AS (
    SELECT c.Segment, y.CustomerID,
           SUM(y.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency='CZK' AND y.Date LIKE '2013-%'
    GROUP BY c.Segment, y.CustomerID
  ),
  min_cte AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           CustomerID,
           total_consumption,
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY Segment ORDER BY total_consumption ASC) AS rn
    FROM cte
  ),
  avg_cte AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           total_consumption/12.0 AS avg_consumption
    FROM min_cte
    WHERE rn=1
  )
  SELECT 1
) AS dummy;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
SELECT 'biggest' AS type, Segment, pct
FROM (
    SELECT Segment,
           (total_2013 - total_2012) / total_2012 * 100.0 AS pct
    FROM (
        SELECT Segment,
               MAX(CASE WHEN yr = '2012' THEN total END) AS total_2012,
               MAX(CASE WHEN yr = '2013' THEN total END) AS total_2013
        FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment,
                   substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS yr,
                   SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
            FROM yearmonth y
            JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
        )
        GROUP BY Segment
    )
)
ORDER BY pct DESC
LIMIT 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 'lowest' AS type, Segment, pct
FROM (
    SELECT Segment,
           (total_2013 - total_2012) / total_2012 * 100.0 AS pct
    FROM (
        SELECT Segment,
               MAX(CASE WHEN yr = '2012' THEN total END) AS total_2012,
               MAX(CASE WHEN yr = '2013' THEN total END) AS total_2013
        FROM (
            SELECT c.Segment,
                   substr(y.Date, 1, 4) AS yr,
                   SUM(y.Consumption) AS total
            FROM yearmonth y
            JOIN customers c ON y.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
            GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
        )
        GROUP BY Segment
    )
)
ORDER BY pct ASC
LIMIT 1;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

    FROM client
    JOIN disp ON client.client_id = disp.client_id
    WHERE client.gender = 'F'
),
oldest_females AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM female_clients
    WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM female_clients)
),
avg_salary AS (
    SELECT account_id, AVG(loan.amount) AS avg_salary
    FROM loan
    GROUP BY account_id
),
lowest_avg AS (
    SELECT account_id, avg_salary
    FROM avg_salary
    WHERE avg_salary = (SELECT MIN(avg_salary) FROM avg_salary)
),
gap AS (
    SELECT MAX(avg_salary) - MIN(avg_salary) AS salary_gap
    FROM avg_salary
)
SELECT o.account_id, g.salary_gap
FROM oldest_females o
JOIN lowest_avg l ON o.account_id = l.account_id
JOIN gap g;	----- bird -----	financial
